sentences.arabic: بِلَالُ بْنُ رَبَاحٍ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ كَانَ عَبْدًا حَبَشِيًّا آمَنَ بِاللَّهِ فَعُذِّبَ بِسَبَبِ إِيمَانِهِ.
sentences.translation: Bilal ibn Rebah, radijallahu anhu, bio je abesinski rob koji je povjerovao u Allaha i zbog toga bio mučen.
sentences.translationEn: Bilal ibn Rabah, may Allah be pleased with him, was an Abyssinian slave who believed in Allah and was tortured because of his faith.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ سَيِّدُهُ يَضَعُ الصَّخْرَةَ الْكَبِيرَةَ عَلَى صَدْرِهِ تَحْتَ الشَّمْسِ الْحَارِّةِ، وَكَانَ بِلَالٌ يَقُولُ: «أَحَدٌ، أَحَدٌ».
sentences.translation: Njegov gospodar stavljao mu je veliku stijenu na grudi pod žarkim suncem, a Bilal je govorio: 'Ehad, ehad (Jedan, jedan).'
sentences.translationEn: His master would place a large rock on his chest under the blazing sun, and Bilal would say: 'Ahad, Ahad (One, One).'

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَاهُ أَبُو بَكْرٍ وَأَعْتَقَهُ، فَصَارَ بِلَالٌ أَوَّلَ مُؤَذِّنٍ فِي الْإِسْلَامِ.
sentences.translation: Ebu Bekr ga je otkupio i oslobodio, pa je Bilal postao prvi mujezin u islamu.
sentences.translationEn: Abu Bakr bought him and freed him, and Bilal became the first muezzin in Islam.

sentences.arabic: يُعَلِّمُنَا بِلَالٌ أَنَّ الصَّبْرَ عَلَى الْأَذَى فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ يَرْفَعُ دَرَجَةَ الْمُؤْمِنِ وَلَا يُذِلُّهُ.
sentences.translation: Bilal nas uči da strpljivost u podnošenju mučenja na Allahovom putu uzdiže vjernika i ne ponižava ga.
sentences.translationEn: Bilal teaches us that patience in enduring harm in the way of Allah elevates the believer and does not humiliate him.

sentences.arabic: فَالتَّمَسُّكُ بِالتَّوْحِيدِ فِي كُلِّ حَالٍ هُوَ عَلَامَةُ الْإِيمَانِ الصَّادِقِ.
sentences.translation: Čvrsto pridržavanje tevhida u svakom stanju znak je iskrenog imana.
sentences.translationEn: Holding firm to tawhid in every circumstance is the sign of true faith.
